This is a testharness.js-based test.
[FAIL] gruCell float16 tensors with options.bias, options.recurrentBias and options.activations=['relu', 'relu']
  assert_less_than_equal: assert_array_approx_equals_ulp: test gruCell float16 actual 0 should be close enough to expected -0.25 by ULP distance: expected a number less than or equal to 3 but got 46080
[FAIL] gruCell float16 tensors with options.bias, options.recurrentBias, options.activations=['relu', 'relu'] and explicit options.layout='zrn'
  assert_less_than_equal: assert_array_approx_equals_ulp: test gruCell float16 actual 0 should be close enough to expected -0.25 by ULP distance: expected a number less than or equal to 3 but got 46080
[FAIL] gruCell float16 tensors with options.bias, options.recurrentBias, options.activations=['relu', 'relu'] and and options.layout='rzn'
  assert_less_than_equal: assert_array_approx_equals_ulp: test gruCell float16 actual 0 should be close enough to expected -0.25 by ULP distance: expected a number less than or equal to 3 but got 46080
[FAIL] gruCell float16 tensors with all options
  assert_less_than_equal: assert_array_approx_equals_ulp: test gruCell float16 actual 0 should be close enough to expected -0.25 by ULP distance: expected a number less than or equal to 3 but got 46080
Harness: the test ran to completion.
